feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Deployment Issue HANA HDI: schemaParameterChangeNotSupported
entry.content:
Hi All,
We have recently performed Node upgrade from 18 to 20 for few services in our landscape.

After deployment of service, below error is encountered:
"{"error":"schemaParameterChangeNotSupported","description":"Changing the 'schema' parameter for instance '' is not supported (is '<Subaccountname-spacename-servicename>', was '<some guid>')"}"

I have observed that initially for few services the mta.yaml did not have config schema name as follows and these services are having above mentioned error:

config:
schema: ${default-container-name}
 
These 2 lines were added sometime later after intial deployment of these services.
 
We have had many deployments of these services after this addition but only now, our deployment is resulting into the specified error.

For these services, we have HANA HDI schema name as some guid and for rest others we have name of HANA HDI schema as <SubaccountName-SpaceName-ServiceName>.

Please suggest how to fix/proceed.

@anshuman_s22 

Thanks.

entry.title: Integrate Genesys with SAP S4 HANA by Softphone Connector
entry.content: I need some information on integrating genesys with SAP S4 HANA by Softphone connector. Please help me on these if anyone knows about it.

entry.title: Business Area (GSBER) not updated after Asset change in Purchase Requisition
entry.content:
We are facing an issue in Purchase Requisition (ME51N / ME52N) related to Account Assignment (Category A – Asset).

When a PR is created:

  • The Business Area (GSBER) is derived based on the initially entered Asset.
  • However, if the Asset (ANLN1) is changed afterwards, the Business Area is not updated accordingly.

Questions

  1. Is this standard SAP behavior that GSBER is not re-derived after Asset change in PR?
  2. Is there any standard configuration or setting to enable re-derivation of Business Area?
  3. Does SAP recommend implementing a BAdI (e.g. ME_PROCESS_REQ_CUST) to handle this?
  4. Is there any SAP Note addressing this behavior?

Best regards,

entry.title: How is table ORDR field ImportEnt used?
entry.content:
https://help.sap.com/doc/089315d8d0f8475a9fc84fb919b501a3/10.0/en-US/SDKHelp/Marketing_Documents/ORDR.htm

There is no further explanation how this field is used. I currently work in a setup where this field in B1 has been somehow renamed (how can one do this?) and I need to know what its original purpose is and how it gets used in B1.

entry.title: How to check the memory usage of a specific table in SAP HANA
entry.content: How to check the memory usage of a specific table in SAP HANA

entry.title: HANA DB User for Calculation View
entry.content:
The BW Team has requested HANA DB User for Calculation View.
In our landscape we have, BW on HANA version NW 7.5, HANA DB version 2.00.089.00 and HANA Cockpit version 2.18.5 in use. The BW team is using Eclipse version: 2023-06 (4.28.0)
To be able to provide the HANA DB user, what steps are required, which privileges to assign to this HANA DB user, which eclipse version should be installed. User to be created in System DB or Tenant DB, kindly suggest.

entry.title: only active database instances are loaded into system memory
entry.content:
Dear Team,

Please ensure only active database instances are loaded into system memory,with a view to optimising RAM utilisation and reducing infrastructure cost .

 

Regards,

Amit

entry.title: S4 HANA 2020 Upgrade On Premise - S4 HANA 2023 or S4 HANA 2025
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

 

Kindly suggest which is best and lesser time consuming.

S4 HANA 2020 to S4 HANA 2023 or

S4 HANA 2020 to S4 HANA 2025

entry.title: How can I set up fields for TmSp_GetDefaultElementsforCR automated?
entry.content:
My company has a Database with 6 schemata (what Business One calls Companies).

a) How can I set up the fields of TmSp_GetDefaultElementsforCR (In Business One "Default Elements for Crystal Report") automated? For example, I'd need the field "foo" in all schemata with a given translation in English/Spanish/German/French.

b) How can I copy the whole bunch of a custom field (foo with all its translations, might be more than the four listed in a) into another schema?

entry.title: Memory_Size of Expensive Statements in DB monitor
entry.content:
A huge value shows under column Memory_Size of Expensive Statements in DB monitor(DB02, DBACOCKPIT, etc.)

Is this OSS Note 3239915 applicable to only SCALE OUT or to SCALE IN as well 

please confirm

entry.title: partitioning recommendation for the acctcr table
entry.content:
Hello

We are analyzing how to proceed with the partitioning of the ACCTCR table, and the recommendation for partitioning the ACCTCR table, as per note 2044468 - topic 27 - indicates that we should perform partitioning by HASH using the AWREF column.

If our strategy is to apply NSE, we need to perform partitioning by RANGE. Which column should we use to perform the RANGE partitioning?

entry.title: HANA does not retain table partitioning when a column is added to the table
entry.content: When adding a column through a SAP(DDIC) transport the table partitions are merged.   The table was partitioned because the row count was nearing the 2 billion limit and the column addition undid the partitions.   Is this normal operations for HANA when a column is added to a partitioned table?    If so, how do we avoid this?

entry.title: LSMW Functions in SAP S/4 Hana Version 2025
entry.content:
I recently learned that LSMW is expected to be deprecated after upgrading to SAP S/4HANA 2025, with the Migrate Your Data (MYD) app positioned as its successor. I would like to seek your technical advice on how existing LSMW-based projects can be transitioned to the new platform.

In particular, I am interested in understanding how to handle transactional data and objects related to updating existing data in S/4HANA, especially scenarios that were previously addressed using LSMW recordings.

#LSMW #Data #Migration

entry.title: AFO Queries with SAP HANA Analytical Privileges
entry.content:
Hi,

Id like to know if the following scenario is possible with SSO. 

I have users logging into AFO to query reports. The reports in question are going to be using SQL Analytical privileges to secure them. The problem I currently have is the technical user SAPHANADB is querying the caluclation view, which means the auth check is being done on the technical user. I would like some sort of principal propagation SSO from AFO, through B4H and into HANA. 

I have checked the DBMS tab in SU01 and both Logon Ticket and Assertion has been ticked. The Kerberos CN is updated in both B4H and HANA. The user also can log into HANA with SSO with Kerberos. 

Is this actually possible with AFO using Analytical Privileges?

entry.title: Multiple External Vendors - PP02 - SIngle Material Number
entry.content:
I am hoping if someone can tell me 1) if this is possible and 2) if you either describe how to or show me where to look, i would be greatful.,

 

I have one material number, it has both internal and multiple external processes, in the routings, the external process have been set to PP02.

 

1) Is it possible to track where the stock is at each external vendor (and how do I do this) and 

2) Is this possible to do with multiple external vendors on one material number.

3) What are my options when it comes to getting PO created for the second external process when the item doesnt come back to the company after the the first process.

entry.title: How to Setup supplier invoice email trigger process in work flow
entry.content:
HI

Please provide the step with example How to Setup supplier invoice email trigger process in work flow

entry.title: Observations on NSE Implementation for CDPOS Table in QS1
entry.content:
We would like to share observations from a recently completed project. We implemented an NSE setup for the CDPOS table in QS1, where the table was partitioned into three parts and moved to warm storage. Currently, all three partitions reside in warm storage, and the overall RAM consumption of the CDPOS table is approximately 1.2 GB.

However, we have observed that the RAM consumption of the CDPOS table increases whenever data from the warm partitions is accessed. We would like to understand whether the system is loading data from warm storage into hot storage even when the request is only for read access.

If the system is indeed reloading data into hot storage upon each read request, we would also like to know when this data gets unloaded. Additionally, is there a way to explicitly unload the data from hot storage (buffer cache) immediately after the request has been processed?

entry.title: Getting Error: Parameterized views can't be used with sqlDialect ‘sqlite’
entry.content:
When I run cds watch --profile hybrid on my CAPM project the following error is popping up

Error: Parameterized views can't be used with sqlDialect ‘sqlite’

But the cds deploy --to hana works perfectly fine and all the artifacts are deployed. I am using HANA for db side. Below is the package.json for the project

{ "name": "xxxxxx", "version": "1.0.0", "description": "A simple CAP project.", "type": "module", "dependencies": { "@cap-js-community/odata-v2-adapter": "^1.15.10", "@cap-js/hana": "^2", "@sap/cds": "^9", "@sap/xssec": "^4", "exceljs": "^4.4.0" }, "devDependencies": { "@sap/cds-dk": "^9" }, "scripts": { "start": "cds-serve" }, "private": true, "cds": { "requires": { "[production]": { "auth": "xsuaa" }, "db": { "kind": "hana" } } } }

entry.title: US11 region CF DB URL unreachable when redirected from BAS
entry.content:
The issue is related to the BAS located in subaccount of US west (OR) region.

"a HANA Cloud orchestration endpoint in Cloud Foundry (cf-us11)"

This URL seems to return DNS_PROBE_FINISHED_NXDOMAIN error. This URL comes when you try to open SAP HANA database explorer from the SAP HANA projects section (in the bottom left) of your Business application studio. This happens only with the us11 region. When you replace us11 with us10 or any other for an instance the database explorer works and you can see your database containers added.

Because of this issue, it is showing no deployed artifacts when you try to create a new SAP HANA artifact within the CAPM project. For instance, in hdbcalculationview when you try to add source in projection node the search list is empty because it is not able to fetch the artifact list.

The cds deploy works and the binding is also there to the db container.

entry.title: documentary batch
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Please help to activate documentary batch in sap hana i want to set up documentary batch for production order and vendor goods recipet integration with EWM.
for this i did the configuration activate the documentary batch , add material type FERT , ROH, HALB.
set up the manual entry process 01,04,06 with 1 entry obligatory and quantity check with warning.
For test this i created the scenario like create the production order released but in component no option showing for documentary batch same for po order .
while MIGO confirmation of GR also not showing batch to enter manually .
is there any step which i missing or what setps i need to follow to complete this documentary batch set up.

production order


PO

Regards,
Arturo
